BulkSavedDamageCreator.Title: Bulk Saved Damage from Images
BulkSavedDamageCreator.FolderHint: Enter a path inside your Foundry data directory (for example: worlds/my-world/assets/attacks). Use Browse to navigate visually.
BulkSavedDamageCreator.ImagesHint: One saved-damage action card will be created per image, named with the full image filename (including extension) to encourage manual review.
BulkSavedDamageCreator.NoImages: No images discovered yet. Browse or scan a folder to see them here.
BulkSavedDamageCreator.ResolveFormulaHint: Roll formula applied to the target's resolve (e.g. 2d6, 1d8+3).
BulkSavedDamageCreator.PowerFormulaHint: Roll formula applied to the target's power resource. Leave 0 for none.
BulkSavedDamageCreator.RepetitionFormulaHint: How many times the card repeats. A number like 1, or a roll formula like 1d4.
BulkSavedDamageCreator.DamageApplicationHint: If off, resolve damage is only applied on the first repetition.
BulkSavedDamageCreator.PowerDamageApplicationHint: If off, power damage is only applied on the first repetition.
BulkSavedDamageCreator.RecursiveHint: When enabled, subdirectories are scanned as well. Cards for nested images are named with their relative path (e.g. "boss/dragon.png").
BulkSavedDamageCreator.NewGroupNameHint: Leave blank to auto-name as "Group N".

Errors.NoFolder: Enter a folder path to scan.
Errors.NoImages: No images found in the selected folder.
Errors.NoImagesWithCount: No images recognized. The folder contains {fileCount} file(s) in source '{source}'. Check that the folder actually contains image files (png, jpg, webp, svg, gif, bmp).
Errors.BrowseFailed: Failed to open the folder browser.
Errors.ScanFailed: Failed to scan the folder. Check the path and try again.
Errors.ScanFailedWithPath: Failed to scan '{folder}' in source '{source}'. The path or source may be incorrect.
Errors.CreateFailed: Failed to create the action cards.
Errors.CreateGroupFailed: Failed to create the new action card group.
